overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player character holding a pistol approaching a Japanese police roadblock on a mountain road, then proceeding up a curved driveway to a modern luxury residence with traditional architectural elements, and finally entering a covered garage corridor. The environment features rocky cliffs, manicured landscaping, and high-end modern Japanese architecture.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a police roadblock on a mountain road, moving between two white police cars with Japanese markings. A blue metal barricade blocks the path ahead, with rocky cliffs and green trees visible in the background under clear skies.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the police blockade to a curved residential road. The player walks along a gray stone retaining wall on the right, with a modern Japanese residence and a distinctive red maple tree becoming visible in the distance ahead.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the modern Japanese residence along the curved driveway. A black van is parked near the entrance, and a tall concrete monolith displaying the address number 12105 stands on the right. The house and its distinctive red maple tree grow larger as the player advances.

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered garage corridor, transitioning from bright natural daylight to artificial lighting. The space features smooth concrete walls, linear ceiling lights, and blue trash bins visible on the right side as the player moves deeper into the residence interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a tense police blockade on a mountain road into the sterile interior of a luxury residence. It begins by passing between two white Japanese police cars and a blue metal barricade set against a backdrop of rocky cliffs and green trees. As the camera moves past the blockade, the scene shifts to a curved residential road where a gray stone retaining wall guides the path toward a modern house and a vibrant red maple tree. The perspective then advances along the driveway, passing a parked black van and a concrete monolith marked 12105 before approaching the main structure. Finally, the bright natural daylight fades as the camera enters a covered garage corridor, transitioning into a space of smooth concrete walls and artificial linear ceiling lights.
